name_en: Dynamic Chip Version M87212 Exclusive Real Shot! This Boulogne bag reinterprets the classic design using Monogram Empreinte leather, showcasing a unique style with multiple carrying options. Easily fits a smartphone in the interior pocket, with a woven chain accented by dazzling metal pieces. Dimensions: 29×16×9.5cm
